text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend my days being as good a trainer as I can be for Maruzensky,
and before long, the time comes for her debut race.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer! Have you come all this way to see me off? Hehe, how
kind of you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer! Have you come all this way to see me off? Hehe, how
kind of you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm just bombdiggity. ♪ The weather today is wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You know, the wind I feel when I run is really special. So I'm going to
take it all in and have a great race.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: See you when it's over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her smile unwavering, she fully utilizes her talents in the race.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're at the last turn and Maruzensky's still in the lead! She hasn't
given up an inch since the start!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I can go faster than this!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's speeding up! She's left the pack in the dust! She
outclasses the competition, and she knows it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky still has a huge lead, and... she clears the finish line! Her
debut race ends in an overwhelming victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A moment later, the awestruck murmurs of the crowd rise to a roar.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm back, Trainer. ♪ Shall we get going—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm back, Trainer. ♪ Shall we get going—

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: This is it... Your day is finally here! The day of your debut!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Right! I know I'm going to win! This is the first step on the road to
becoming a Triple Crown Champion!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! I know you can do it! Put all that training to good use
and win!

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text: Yeeeah!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, it's nothing...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that's all for today once we get back to the academy, right? Do
you have any plans after?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that's all for today once we get back to the academy, right? Do
you have any plans after?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: If you're not too busy... How about a drive?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Mhm. You're okay, right? Great, I'll come pick you up! Wait for me at
the school entrance, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As per Maruzensky's instructions, I wait for her at the entrance when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrrrooom! Screeeech...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hi, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hi, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky gets out of her sporty, cherry red car and walks over to
me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, what's that look on your face for?
choice_data_list: That's some ride you got there...
That's some ride you got there...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I knooow! Isn't she the best?! This little beauty's my partner, Tata!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
A sleek, cool body with an engine that roars like a tiger... And check
out the scissor doors. Aren't they fabulous?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Nothing feels better than riding in this baby! You're gonna love it, so
hurry! Get in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I take a seat in Maruzensky's beloved "partner".

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The acceleration! The flowing scenery! Isn't this the best?! But you
still haven't seen how bad to the bone Tata really is!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry—I follow the rules of the road! Except... I take them to
the limit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VROOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I have a terrifying time that seems to last forever.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Aaah, that was great! And ending a freewheeling drive at the beach...
How romantic!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: How was it? I bet riding in Tata was like a taste of heaven!
choice_data_list: I certainly feel like I almost ascended to heaven...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: How was it? I bet riding in Tata was like a taste of heaven!
choice_data_list: I certainly feel like I almost ascended to heaven...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Good, I'm so glad you enjoyed it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Driving's wonderful. You let your body be taken by the speed and
become one with the wind. It's like you can keep going forever.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Being able to experience that joy with my own body... I'm so happy I
was born an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And the thrill of speeding faster than the wind... There's nothing like
it!
choice_data_list: You really love going fast, huh?
You really love going fast, huh?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You know it! But that's really all there is to it for me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Most racers have some dream to fulfill or goal to boast about. But
such complicated matters... they're not for girls like me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Don't get me wrong. I love running and racing, you know? It's just...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Today when I was next to so many big dreamers, I caught myself
wondering if I'm... in the right place.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! Am I being a downer?! That won't do for our first drive
together!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! Am I being a downer?! That won't do for our first drive
together!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I know! Since we're at the beach, how about a little game of tag?
You know, like those scenes they have in the trendy TV soaps!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, you're "it"! Ahaha, catch me if you caaan! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just a girl without lofty dreams or goals... It feels as though I got to
peek under the hood and take a look at who she truly is behind that
precocious smile.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, hahaha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud, thud, thud!
choice_data_list: Wait, there's no way I'll ever catch you!
Wait, there's no way I'll ever catch you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Come on, you never know till you try! Keep at it, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Come on, you never know till you try! Keep at it, Trainer! ♪
